chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 975 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For orders on CMA No.4093/2023 (Ex./A) 3. For hearing of main case 04.10.2023 Syed Zaffar Ali Shah Bukhari, Advocate for the petitioner..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel does not press this petition and submits that petitioner will approach the Service Tribunal for redressal of his grievance. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed as not pressed along with listed application, leaving the petitioner at liberty to avail remedy, available to him, in accordance with law. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
